Tripod X Display Hardware for Portable Trade Show & Event Banners

Professional tripod X display hardware designed for 24x60 banner mounting at trade shows, retail locations, and promotional events. This lightweight yet durable hardware system features a collapsible tripod base that sets up quickly for instant banner displays.

The flexible fiberglass arms maintain consistent banner tension while the sturdy tripod base provides stable support on various surfaces. Perfect for businesses requiring portable banner display solutions that can be assembled and disassembled repeatedly.

Key Hardware Features

  • Tripod base folds flat for easy transport and storage
  • Strong fiberglass arms keep banners taut and wrinkle-free
  • Quick setup design for trade shows and events
  • Supports 24x60 banner dimensions perfectly
  • Includes drawstring carrying pouch
  • Lightweight at only 2.4 lbs for portability

Hardware Dimensions

Assembled Size: 26.75" W x 65.75" H x 30" D
Weight: 2.4 lbs
Banner Compatibility: 24x60 banners (sold separately)

PASTE INTO: Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== MATERIAL OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

X Display Hardware Material & Construction Details

Our tripod X display hardware is engineered with premium materials to ensure reliable performance across multiple setups and events.

Tripod Base Construction

The tripod base features durable metal construction with a powder-coated finish that resists scratches and wear. The legs extend smoothly and lock securely in place, providing stable support on both indoor and outdoor surfaces.

Fiberglass Support Arms

Flexible fiberglass arms offer the perfect balance of strength and flexibility. These arms maintain consistent tension on your banner while being gentle enough to prevent tearing or damage to banner materials.

Hardware Finish

All metal components feature a professional black finish that complements any banner design or trade show display setup. The coating provides protection against rust and corrosion for long-term use.

Carrying Case Material

Includes a durable drawstring pouch made from heavy-duty nylon fabric. The carrying case protects your hardware during transport and storage while keeping all components organized.

PASTE INTO: Material Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FINISHING OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Setup & Assembly Options for Tripod X Display Hardware

The tripod X display hardware is designed for quick assembly without tools, making it ideal for trade shows and events where setup time is critical.

Standard Assembly Configuration

The hardware arrives ready to use with all components pre-assembled. Simply unfold the tripod legs, extend the fiberglass arms, and attach your 24x60 banner using the integrated clips.

Leg Extension Settings

Tripod legs can be adjusted for uneven surfaces, ensuring your banner display remains level and professional-looking on various floor types.

Arm Positioning

Fiberglass arms extend to the perfect length for 24x60 banners, creating optimal tension across the entire banner surface for a smooth, professional appearance.

Folding & Storage

The entire hardware system folds down to a compact size that fits easily in the included carrying pouch. Perfect for businesses that attend multiple trade shows or events.

Banner Attachment System

Integrated clips securely hold banner grommets without requiring additional hardware or tools. The attachment points are positioned precisely for 24x60 banner dimensions.

PASTE INTO: Finishing Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCTION TIMES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Production Times for Custom X Display Hardware Orders

We maintain ready inventory of tripod X display hardware to ensure fast delivery for your trade show and event needs.

Standard Production Options

3 Business Day Standard
Our most popular turnaround option. Free and fast enough for most display hardware orders. Perfect for planned trade shows and events.

2 Business Day Priority
Expedited processing for urgent display needs. Ideal when you need hardware quickly for last-minute events or replacements.

5 Business Day Saver
Cost-effective option when you have flexible timing. Great for ordering backup hardware or planning ahead for future events.

Processing Schedule

Orders received before 5:00 PM CST are processed the same business day. Orders placed after 5:00 PM CST begin processing the following business day.

Production times represent the time needed to prepare your hardware order for shipment, not including transit time. Combined production and shipping time determines your total delivery schedule.

Inventory Availability

Tripod X display hardware is typically in stock and ready for immediate processing. If inventory levels are low, we'll contact you immediately with updated timing.

Shipping Options for X Display Hardware Delivery

Fast, reliable shipping ensures your tripod X display hardware arrives when you need it for trade shows and events.

Standard Shipping Methods

Ground shipping is included for most hardware orders. The compact, lightweight design keeps shipping costs low while ensuring safe delivery.

Expedited Delivery

Packaging Protection

Hardware is carefully packaged to prevent damage during transit. The included carrying case provides additional protection for all components.

Delivery Tracking

Full tracking information provided for all shipments. Monitor your hardware delivery progress through our online tracking system.

International Shipping

International delivery available for X display hardware orders. Contact our team for rates and delivery timeframes to your location.

Large Quantity Orders

Multiple hardware units may qualify for freight shipping options. We'll recommend the most cost-effective delivery method for your order size.

Trade Show & Event Uses for Tripod X Display Hardware

Tripod X display hardware provides versatile banner mounting solutions across multiple business and promotional applications.

Trade Show Displays

Perfect for trade show booths where quick setup and professional appearance are essential. The compact folding design makes transport between shows convenient.

Retail Promotions

Ideal for retail stores showcasing sales, promotions, or new product announcements. Easy to move between locations within your store.

Corporate Events

Professional appearance for corporate presentations, conferences, and company events. Multiple units can create impressive display walls.

Outdoor Events

Stable tripod base works well on various outdoor surfaces for festivals, farmers markets, and promotional events.

Real Estate Marketing

Real estate professionals use tripod displays for open houses, property tours, and community marketing events.

Restaurant & Hospitality

Hotels and restaurants use portable displays for special events, menu promotions, and seasonal marketing campaigns.

Educational Institutions

Schools and universities utilize tripod displays for campus events, recruitment fairs, and informational presentations.

Healthcare Facilities

Medical offices and hospitals use portable displays for health fairs, educational events, and facility promotions.

PASTE INTO: Common Uses Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ARTWORK TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Hardware Specifications & Banner Compatibility Requirements

Your tripod X display hardware is specifically designed for 24x60 banners with standard grommet spacing and attachment points.

Compatible Banner Dimensions

Required Size: 24 inches wide x 60 inches tall
Grommet Spacing: Standard spacing compatible with fiberglass arm positioning
Material Weight: Supports all standard banner materials including vinyl, fabric, and mesh

Grommet Requirements

Banners must include grommets at the four corner positions to attach to the hardware clips. Standard 1/2" grommets work perfectly with the integrated attachment system.

Banner Material Compatibility

The flexible fiberglass arms accommodate various banner materials without causing damage or excessive wear. Compatible with:

  • 13oz vinyl banners
  • Fabric banners
  • Mesh banners for outdoor use
  • Canvas banners

Setup Instructions

Detailed setup instructions are included with your hardware. The process typically takes less than 2 minutes and requires no additional tools.

Maintenance Requirements

Minimal maintenance required. Wipe down metal components periodically and store in the included carrying case to extend hardware life.

Order Professional X Display Hardware for Your Banner Stands

Get the professional display hardware your business needs for trade shows, events, and retail promotions. Our tripod X display hardware combines portability with durability for reliable banner mounting wherever your business takes you.

The lightweight design and quick setup make this hardware perfect for businesses that participate in multiple events throughout the year. Order today and have your display hardware ready for your next promotional opportunity.

Why Choose Our X Display Hardware

  • Professional appearance enhances your brand presentation
  • Durable construction withstands repeated use

  • Compact storage fits in most vehicles

Ready to enhance your marketing displays? Add tripod X display hardware to your cart and pair it with custom 24x60 banners for a complete promotional solution.

PASTE INTO: Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

FAQ - X Display Hardware Setup & Compatibility

What banner sizes work with this tripod X display hardware?

This hardware is specifically designed for 24x60 banners. The fiberglass arms and attachment points are positioned for this exact size to ensure proper tension and professional appearance.

How long does it take to set up the tripod X display?

Setup typically takes less than 2 minutes. Simply unfold the tripod legs, extend the fiberglass arms, and clip your banner to the attachment points. No tools are required.

Can this hardware be used outdoors?

Yes, the tripod X display hardware works well for outdoor events. The stable tripod base and weather-resistant finish make it suitable for outdoor trade shows, festivals, and promotional events.

What's included with the hardware order?

Your order includes the complete tripod X display hardware system with tripod base, fiberglass support arms, banner attachment clips, and a drawstring carrying pouch. Banners are sold separately.

How much does the hardware weigh?

The complete hardware system weighs only 2.4 lbs, making it easy to transport between events and trade shows.

Do I need to order banners separately?

Yes, banners are sold separately. This allows you to order multiple banners for different events while using the same hardware system.

Can I order multiple hardware units for a large display?

Absolutely. Multiple tripod X display units can create impressive banner walls for large trade show booths or corporate events. Quantity discounts may apply for multiple units.

How do I store the hardware between events?

The hardware folds down completely and fits in the included drawstring carrying pouch. Store in a dry location to maintain the finish and extend the hardware life.

PASTE INTO: FAQ Tab --------------------------------------------------
